events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the quantity takeoff/area count is missing, the checkpoint can't be scored against actual scope, so I flagged `decision: needs_more_info` (not a pass or fail) with medium risk — the photographed EMT runs look workmanlike, but fill (Ch. 9) and bend-limit (NEC 358.26) compliance can't be verified without the takeoff. Actions call for requesting the takeoff and tying photos to run/area IDs before re-scoring.
